message:
SQL 執行失敗: SimpleDB Execution Error: HTTP Error: HTTP GET error reading 's3://tiptop-raw/raw/v1/tiptop_jp/INAG_T/year=/?encoding-type=url&list-type=2&prefix=raw%2Fv1%2Ftiptop_jp%2FINAG_T%2Fyear%3D' in region '' (HTTP 404 Not Found)

LINE 2: FROM read_parquet('s3://tiptop-raw/raw/v1/tiptop_jp/INAG_T/year...
             ^
SQL: SELECT INAG001, INAG004, INAG005, INAG007, INAG008
FROM read_parquet('s3://tiptop-raw/raw/v1/tiptop_jp/INAG_T/year=*/month=*/data.parquet')
WHERE INAG001 = 'NI001'
LIMIT 100

details.sql:
SELECT INAG001, INAG004, INAG005, INAG007, INAG008
FROM read_parquet('s3://tiptop-raw/raw/v1/tiptop_jp/INAG_T/year=*/month=*/data.parquet')
WHERE INAG001 = 'NI001'
LIMIT 100
